message: The flowers in the vase are wilting. Normally,
I wouldn't neglect taking care of the flowers.
but it's probably just my imagination.
At first glance, it seems like nothing has changed, but I feel like something's off.
I wonder where Guy has gone.
I've been feeling really tired lately.
You should be careful. It's the kind of time where a lot's going on and fatigue sets in.
Yeah, thanks for worrying about me.
I want to see Guy and talk to him.
I wonder why he hasn’t called me? I’ve been trying to avoid going out and waiting for his call.
I understand how you feel, but I think that's not a good state to be in.
But right now, I just want to wait for Guy.
I can't help but wonder if Guy hates me.
See, it's because I'm cooped up at home that I'm getting all negative.
I just want to focus on Guy right now.
That's about the only thing I look forward to.
Where in the world has he gone?
Right now, it feels like I'm just shuttling back and forth between Günter's office and home.
it might be meddling, but I can't say I agree with that.
I think during times like this, it's better to connect with others and change your mood.
I just don't have the courage to go out into a crowd right now.
Talking to Günter helps me feel at ease.
Well, he's a counselor after all. If talking makes it tough, then what's the point?
But according to Günter, I should probably meet up a bit more.
I wonder where Guy has gone.
It's just cruel that he hasn't even contacted me.
Gai should at least send a message by now.
I feel like the atmosphere is becoming dangerous again.
If only Gai would just come back, everything would work out.
